title: Notes?
content:
Notes?
Yo that Not Like Us video is crazy
I’ve never seen anyone get murdered in the broad day of the mainstream like this. But it’s well deserved. And easily the dopest rap battle win of all time. Over the last few years, K Dot has secured his spot as my number 1 of all time. Mr. Morale got him close. This Drake massacre locked it in. Hell yeah
https://youtu.be/H58vbez_m4E
Sharing it because I want to see it break records
100% I would have taught this video in ENC haha
This shit is so good:
https://open.spotify.com/track/4JfpJrrGNXRj2yXm1fYV23?si=f_kx9V80RraiO9Q4fdc5Ew

D:
Yo death of slim shady is a craaazy listen
He got our boy on this one:
https://open.spotify.com/track/0DIcssPpatAMqFXLZCxZMN?si=A6CKMuDYQvK_4myLrWPPxA&context=spotify%3Aalbum%3A3kjHLu1pL7tdY88GFwEkl6
https://open.spotify.com/track/3LkXOTWDwskwciQoARFDzu?si=en7NUzLQR0a-21r3upjhGw&context=spotify%3Aalbum%3A3kjHLu1pL7tdY88GFwEkl6

A:
Bro it's so good!

D:
You listened all the way through?
context: From document: Conversations on Music and Art and Life — chunk 6 (chunk 6/10)
